title: Contact
text:
Feel free to reach out — I’m always happy to chat about research, collaboration, or anything else.
Email: philippe.sloksnath@uzh.ch
Institution: Department of Communication and Media Research, University of Zurich

title: Philippe Sloksnath
text: I am a Research and Teaching Assistant at the Department of Communication and Media Research at University of Zurich. My research is situated in Communication Science, Psychology and Human–Computer Interaction, with a particular focus on AI-based persuasion, misinformation, and media effects. I care about statistical inference and transparent, reproducible research practices. Always happy to chat.

title: Philippe Sloksnath
text:
Open Science
I value scientific integrity and strive to make my research as reliable, transparent, and reproducible as possible. Please reach out if anything is unclear, insufficiently reported, or not reproducible.
